Work this week:
• RTB - 5060 - CT DF - Send Conditional Letter and Add Reduction of Coverage Discloser Notice NP9945 07 24 on Renewals Effective On Or After 11/23/2025 - Test Case Creation
Develop a test case to validate that, for Utah Dwelling Fire (UT DF) policy renewals effective on or after  November 23, 2025, the system correctly performs the following action - Issues a Conditional Letter as part of the renewal documentation process. Includes the "Reduction of Coverage Disclosure Notice" (Form NP9945 07 24) with the renewal package. The test should confirm that both documents are generated and delivered appropriately, in compliance with regulatory and business requirements. Ensure edge cases are considered, including renewals processed before and after the effective date, and verify that the notice is not issued for ineligible policy types or states.
• RTB - 6678 - CT DF - Create New INow Product Version Eff 11/23/2025 - VMIGPROD-4372 - Started Test Case Execution
Test case execution for the new CT DFA INOW product version, effective 11/23/2025, was started. The validation covered key areas including Dwelling Fire rating product creation, check rating like base amount, factors etc and integration with downstream systems such as billing and metadata sync. Execute all test cases created with regression scenarios to find defect. Verify the new product version is functioning as expected and ready for the next phase of testing or deployment.
Future work plans:
Test Case Execution of - 
• RTB - 6678 - CT DF - Create New INow Product Version Eff 11/23/2025 - VMIGPROD-4372 
• RTB - 5047 -  Update CT Dwelling Fire Inflation Guard for Appian (Front End)
